evidence: gpu_renderer.rs and image_backend.rs are large monoliths that could each become a subdirectory.
ThumbnailEntry lives between shader constants and the Renderer struct with no grouping.

issues.summary: gpu_renderer.rs (1560 LOC) should be decomposed into a src/render/ package like app/ was
evidence: 1560 LOC complexity score 623 — the largest file by both metrics.
Contains: WGSL shader sources, vertex/uniform type definitions, ThumbnailEntry, Renderer struct, image pipeline, crop pipeline, thumbnail strip rendering, text rendering.
Each of these is a distinct deliverable that would benefit from isolation.
issues.suggestion: Create src/render/mod.rs, src/render/pipeline.rs (image+crop pipeline setup), src/render/thumbnails.rs (ThumbnailEntry + thumbnail strip encoding), src/render/text.rs (GlyphBrush + font loading). Follow the src/app/ decomposition pattern.

root_causes: gpu_renderer.rs grew organically without applying the modularization lesson from src/app/.
likely_symptoms: High merge conflict rate on gpu_renderer.rs; difficulty onboarding new contributors.
